title: vandellia hypandra
intro: Vandellia hypandra is a tropical plant commonly found in the Philippines, also known as "tongawati" in some regions. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Vandellia hypandra include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory health. In herbal preparations, Vandellia hypandra is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal benefits.
